svg.title: Pro IA Agent project architecture with three new integrations
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing orchestration, intelligence, browser engine, data, and observability layers for the AI Phone Hunter project, with code-review-graph, caveman, and vector-less RAG integrations highlighted.

g.text: AgentGraph (LangGraph-style) · Task queue · Worker pool · Circuit breaker
